toolUseResult.originalFile:
# ThinkAloud

Local-first voice input for macOS. Press a hotkey anywhere, dictate, get the text pasted into the focused app — and optionally save the recording + transcript as a personal dataset.

Built around [Qwen3-ASR](https://huggingface.co/mlx-community?search_models=Qwen3-ASR) running on-device via [mlx-audio-swift](https://github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-audio-swift). No cloud, no telemetry.

## Features

- **One hotkey, whole flow.** Default `⌥Space` starts recording → press again to stop & transcribe → press again to insert & save. The three actions are also rebindable separately.
- **Streaming transcription** with editable preview before inserting.
- **Chinese output preference** — keep model output as-is, prefer Traditional (正體), or prefer Simplified (簡體). Conversion runs locally via ICU.
- **Dataset browser** — play recordings, scrub the timeline, edit transcripts, bulk delete.
- **Built-in benchmark** — re-run any saved model against your dataset, see CER + exact-match rate + per-character git-style diff. Multiple runs kept for cross-model comparison. JSON export.
- **Push to Hugging Face Hub** — full LFS support, repo card auto-generated, token stored in macOS Keychain.
- **Idle auto-unload** of model weights to free memory between sessions.
- **Automatic updates** via [Sparkle](https://sparkle-project.org/) — checks GitHub Releases daily, verifies each update's signature, and installs on your OK. Settings → Updates.

## Requirements

- macOS 15 (Sequoia) or later
- Apple Silicon (M-series)
- ~600 MB – 4 GB free disk per model variant
- Internet on first run (model download) and for HF push

## Quick start

1. Launch ThinkAloud — a microphone icon appears in the menu bar.
2. Grant **Microphone** and **Accessibility** the first time the system asks (or via Settings → Permissions).
3. Click into any text field in any app.
4. Press `⌥Space` to start recording.
5. Press `⌥Space` to stop and transcribe (streamed live into the popup).
6. Press `⌥Space` to insert into the focused app and save to your dataset.

(Or just press once and rely on the same key dispatching the right action per phase.)

## Settings

| Pane | What it controls |
| --- | --- |
| **Hotkeys** | Per-action keybindings (start / stop / insert + save). All default to `⌥Space`. |
| **Permissions** | Microphone + Accessibility status. One-click "Open System Settings". |
| **Model** | Quality preset (Fast / Balanced / Accurate Qwen3-ASR variants), Chinese output preference, idle auto-unload timeout, smoke test. |
| **Dataset** | Storage stats, open data folder, export JSONL, clear all. Opens the dataset browser. |
| **Advanced** | Per-model download/remove. Hugging Face token. |

## Dataset browser

Open from menu bar **Browse Dataset…** (`⌘D`) or Settings → Dataset.

- **Records** — saved dictations. Play, scrub, edit the transcript (raw stays immutable, edited overwrites). Multi-select + `⌘⌫` for bulk delete. Push the whole dataset to HF Hub from the toolbar.
- **Benchmark** — pick a model + Chinese preference, run the full pipeline (audio decode → model → post-process) against every record. Reports overall CER, exact-match rate, average latency; per-record diffs show what the model omitted (green underline) vs hallucinated (red strikethrough). Multiple runs are kept in-session for comparison and can be exported as JSON.

## Privacy

- All audio is processed on-device. Nothing is sent to a server unless you explicitly press **Push** in the dataset browser.
- The Hugging Face token is stored in macOS Keychain — never on disk in plain text, never in UserDefaults.
- Recordings are only saved to your dataset when you choose **Insert & save**. Plain Insert discards the audio.
- The dataset (SQLite + WAV files) lives at `~/Library/Application Support/ThinkAloud/`.

## Build from source

```bash
# Install build tooling
brew install xcodegen

# Generate the Xcode project from project.yml
xcodegen generate

# Build
xcodebuild -project ThinkAloud.xcodeproj -scheme ThinkAloud -configuration Debug build

# Run tests (37 unit tests; one optional live ASR test gated by env)
xcodebuild -project ThinkAloud.xcodeproj -scheme ThinkAloud -configuration Debug test
```

To open in Xcode: `open ThinkAloud.xcodeproj`.

The project signs with Developer ID Application (so TCC permissions persist across builds). To build locally, edit `project.yml` and replace `DEVELOPMENT_TEAM` with your own team ID, then regenerate.

## Releasing & auto-update

Pushing a `v*` tag (e.g. `v0.2.0`) triggers `.github/workflows/release.yml`, which builds, signs, notarizes, and staples a DMG, then publishes a GitHub Release. The app updates itself with [Sparkle](https://sparkle-project.org/):

- `SUFeedURL` (in `project.yml`) points at `releases/latest/download/appcast.xml`, which always resolves to the newest published release.
- The release job EdDSA-signs the stapled DMG and uploads a one-item `appcast.xml` next to it. The in-app **Settings → Updates** pane offers manual checks plus toggles for automatic checking and automatic download+install.

**One-time signing-key setup** (required for updates to actually be served):

```bash
# Get Sparkle's tools (matches the framework version; any 2.x works for signing).
curl -L https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle/releases/download/2.9.2/Sparkle-2.9.2.tar.xz | tar -xJ

# Generate the ed25519 key pair. Stores the private key in your login Keychain and
# prints SUPublicEDKey — already set in project.yml as `SUPublicEDKey`.
./bin/generate_keys

# Export the private key and add it to the repo as the SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY secret,
# then delete the file. (Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → New repository secret.)
./bin/generate_keys -x sparkle_private_key.txt
gh secret set SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY < sparkle_private_key.txt
rm sparkle_private_key.txt
```

Keep the **same** Developer ID certificate and the **same** EdDSA key across every release — Sparkle rejects an update whose signing identity doesn't match the installed copy. `CFBundleVersion` must also increase each release; CI derives it from the run number, which is monotonic. If `SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY` is unset the release still ships, but no appcast is generated and clients won't see the update.

## Tech stack

- SwiftUI + AppKit, Swift 6, macOS 15+
- [mlx-audio-swift](https://github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-audio-swift) — Qwen3-ASR runtime
- [mlx-swift](https://github.com/ml-explore/mlx-swift) — Apple's MLX
- [GRDB.swift](https://github.com/groue/GRDB.swift) — SQLite layer
- [KeyboardShortcuts](https://github.com/sindresorhus/KeyboardShortcuts) — global hotkeys
- [xcodegen](https://github.com/yonaskolb/XcodeGen) — project file generation

## Status

MVP. Working end-to-end on macOS 15.x / Apple Silicon. Tested with Qwen3-ASR 0.6B-4bit, 1.7B-4bit, and 1.7B-8bit variants.

input.command:
cd /Users/jacoblincool/Documents/GitHub/think-aloud
echo "=== files changed ==="
git status --short
echo
echo "=== confirm pbxproj config association (Debug vs Release) ==="
awk 'NR>=620 && NR<=700 && (/name = (Debug|Release)/ || /OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS/ || /buildSettings/ {})' ThinkAloud.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj 2>/dev/null | grep -nE "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS|name = (Debug|Release)" | head
echo "--- direct check: which config has which flag ---"
python3 - <<'PY'
import re
t=open("ThinkAloud.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj").read()
# find each XCBuildConfiguration block with OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS and report its name
for m in re.finditer(r'/\* (Debug|Release) \*/ = \{\s*isa = XCBuildConfiguration;(.*?)name = (Debug|Release);', t, re.S):
    body=m.group(2)
    fm=re.search(r'OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS = "([^"]+)"', body)
    if fm:
        print(f"{m.group(3):8s} -> {fm.group(1)}")
PY

兩個背景工作進行中（測試建置、審查 workflow），完成時都會通知我。先給你目前進度總結。

## 目前進度

**已完成並驗證：**
- ✅ `project.yml`：加入 Sparkle（`from: 2.8.0`，實際解析到 2.9.2）、Info.plist 鍵（`SUFeedURL`、真實公鑰 `SUPublicEDKey`、`SUEnableAutomaticChecks`、`SUAllowsAutomaticUpdates`、每日檢查）、Release 簽章改 `--timestamp`（Debug 維持 `none`）。
- ✅ `UpdaterController`（`@MainActor @Observable` 包 `SPUStandardUpdaterController`）+ `UpdatesPane` 設定分頁 + 選單列「檢查更新…」+ `validateMenuItem` 停用邏輯。
- ✅ 6 個在地化字串（zh-Hant）。
- ✅ `release.yml`：新增「Generate Sparkle appcast」步驟（對 staple 後的 DMG 簽章 → 單筆 `appcast.xml` → 上傳為 release asset），並更新發佈步驟。
- ✅ README + secrets 文件（含一次性金鑰設定指令）。
- ✅ **編譯成功、零警告**；內建 Info.plist 確認含全部 Sparkle 鍵；Sparkle.framework 已嵌入；`sign_update` 簽章路徑端對端實測通過。

**進行中（背景）：**
- ⏳ 單元測試套件（確認加入 Sparkle 後測試 bundle 仍連結/通過）。
- ⏳ 對抗式程式碼審查 workflow（Swift 並行/反應式、build 設定、CI heredoc/簽章邊界情況）。

**還需要你做的一步**（我無法代勞）：把 EdDSA 私鑰設成 repo secret `SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY`（README「Releasing & auto-update」有逐字指令）。公鑰已寫入設定。設好並推一個 `v*` tag 後，線上才會開始供應更新。

等兩個背景工作回來後，我會處理任何審查發現的問題並回報最終結果。

content.text: 測試失敗原因是 **「test runner hung before establishing connection」**——這是**測試宿主 app 啟動/連線**問題，不是測試邏輯或編譯失敗。我用 `CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` 跑（未簽章宿主 app + 嵌入的 Sparkle.framework），這很可能就是主因。正確做法是用真實簽章跑測試。先確認本機有 Developer ID 憑證。

content.activeForm: 研究 Sparkle 整合最佳實務

content.subject: project.yml 加入 Sparkle 套件與 Info.plist 鍵

content.subject: 實作 UpdaterController 與設定 UI
content.description: 新增 @MainActor UpdaterController（包 SPUStandardUpdaterController）、CheckForUpdatesView/設定面板、AppContainer 持有、選單列「檢查更新…」項目
content.activeForm: 實作 UpdaterController 與設定 UI

content.subject: 在地化字串
content.description: 在 Localizable.xcstrings 加入更新相關的使用者字串（含 zh-Hant/zh-Hans，若其他字串已有翻譯則比照）

content.subject: CI：產生並託管 appcast
content.description: release.yml 新增 EdDSA 簽章 + 產生 appcast.xml + 上傳為 release asset；文件化金鑰產生與 GitHub secret 設定
content.activeForm: 設定 CI appcast 流程

aiTitle: Add update check and auto-update feature

content.text:
Developer ID 憑證在本機（`JHEN-KE LIN (5H75SGA7KP)`），log 裡沒有 Sparkle crash/例外。

幾乎可以確定原因：用 `CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` 時宿主 app 未簽章，Sparkle 的 `SPUStandardUpdaterController(startingUpdater: true)` 偵測到 app 未正確簽章會**彈出 modal 警告**並阻塞 run loop → 測試 runner 連不上 → 逾時。真實情況 app 一定有簽章，不會發生。我用**真實簽章**重跑測試來確證（背景執行）。

input.command:
cd /Users/jacoblincool/Documents/GitHub/think-aloud
rm -f /tmp/ta_test_signed.log
xcodebuild -project ThinkAloud.xcodeproj -scheme ThinkAloud -configuration Debug \
  -destination 'platform=macOS,arch=arm64' \
  COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO \
  test > /tmp/ta_test_signed.log 2>&1
echo "xcodebuild_exit=$?"
input.description: Run test suite with real Developer ID signing

aiTitle: Add update check and auto-update feature

content.text:
完成。「檢查更新 + 自動更新」已透過 **Sparkle 2.x** 整合進 ThinkAloud，並經實證驗證。

## 做了什麼

**App 內**
- `UpdaterController`（`@MainActor @Observable` 包 `SPUStandardUpdaterController`），由 `AppContainer` 持有整個生命週期；KVO 監看 `canCheckForUpdates`（用 `change.newValue` 避開 Sendable/main-actor 衝突）。
- **選單列**新增「檢查更新…」，並用 `validateMenuItem` 在檢查進行中自動停用。
- **設定 → 更新**分頁：顯示目前版本、「立即檢查」按鈕、「自動檢查更新」「自動下載並安裝更新」兩個開關（後者在自動檢查關閉時停用）。
- 預設行為符合你選的：**自動檢查、安裝前先詢問**（`SUEnableAutomaticChecks=true`、自動下載預設關）。
- 6 個 zh-Hant 在地化字串。

**Build / 設定**（`project.yml` → xcodegen 重新產生）
- Sparkle `from: 2.8.0`（解析到 2.9.2）；Info.plist 加入 `SUFeedURL`、真實 `SUPublicEDKey`、每日檢查等鍵。
- Release 簽章改 `--timestamp`（Debug 維持 `--timestamp=none` 以加速本機建置），確保 Sparkle 巢狀 helper/XPC 也帶安全時間戳、可過公證。

**CI**（`release.yml`）
- 新增「Generate Sparkle appcast」：對 **staple 後**的 DMG 用 `sign_update` 簽章 → 產生單筆 `appcast.xml` → 與 DMG 一起上傳為 release asset。`SUFeedURL` 指向 `releases/latest/download/appcast.xml`（永遠指向最新發佈）。
- README + secrets 標頭文件化一次性金鑰設定。

## 驗證結果
- ✅ **編譯成功、零警告**（修掉一個並行警告）。
- ✅ **42 個測試全綠**（1 個 env-gated 略過）— 用真實 Developer ID 簽章跑，順帶證明 app 啟動鏈含 Sparkle 在執行期正常。
- ✅ 內建 Info.plist 含全部 Sparkle 鍵、Sparkle.framework 已嵌入、pbxproj 簽章旗標正確。
- ✅ `sign_update` 端對端簽章/驗證往返實測通過。
- ✅ 對抗式審查（Swift / build / CI 三面向）：4 個原始發現經獨立驗證**全部駁回，0 個真實 bug**。

> 過程中發現：用 `CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO`（未簽章）跑測試會 hang——那是 Sparkle 偵測 app 未正確簽章而彈出 modal 阻塞 run loop 的假象；真實簽章下不會發生（本專案 Debug 也以 Developer ID 簽章）。

## 你還需要做一步（我無法代勞）

把 EdDSA **私鑰**設為 repo secret，公鑰已寫進設定（`8IyjtacKsc5qlweQsGwig2OyD9e2dETsJzzy4QL1A8o=`）。私鑰已在你的 login Keychain，匯出並設定：

```bash
cd /tmp/sparkle-tools          # 我下載的工具還在這
./bin/generate_keys -x sparkle_private_key.txt
gh secret set SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY < sparkle_private_key.txt
rm sparkle_private_key.txt
```

設好後推一個 `v*` tag（如 `v0.2.0`），CI 就會發佈帶 appcast 的版本，舊版 app 隔天（或手動「檢查更新…」）就能收到更新。若 secret 未設，發佈仍會成功，只是不產生 appcast、不供應更新。

我**沒有 commit**（你沒要求）。改動目前已 staged，要我幫你開分支提交或調整任何預設行為（例如預設開啟自動安裝、改檢查頻率）都可以說。

content.text: 好的，兩件事我來處理：把 app 版本改成 0.2.0，並幫你設好 GitHub secret。先確認 `gh` 認證狀態，同時改版本號。

name: ThinkAloud
options:
  bundleIdPrefix: com.jacoblincool
  deploymentTarget:
    macOS: "15.0"
  developmentLanguage: en
  createIntermediateGroups: true

settings:
  base:
    SWIFT_VERSION: "6.0"
    MARKETING_VERSION: "0.1.0"
    CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION: "1"
    MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET: "15.0"
    SWIFT_STRICT_CONCURRENCY: complete

packages:
  KeyboardShortcuts:
    url: https://github.com/sindresorhus/KeyboardShortcuts
    from: 2.4.0
  mlx-audio-swift:
    url: https://github.com/JacobLinCool/mlx-audio-swift
    branch: add-whisper
  mlx-swift:
    url: https://github.com/ml-explore/mlx-swift
    from: 0.30.6
  GRDB:
    url: https://github.com/groue/GRDB.swift
    from: 7.10.0
  Sparkle:
    url: https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle
    from: 2.8.0

targets:
  ThinkAloud:
    type: application
    platform: macOS
    deploymentTarget: "15.0"
    sources:
      - path: ThinkAloud/App
      - path: ThinkAloud/UI
      - path: ThinkAloud/Core
      - path: ThinkAloud/Models
      - path: ThinkAloud/Resources/Assets.xcassets
        buildPhase: resources
      - path: ThinkAloud/Resources/Localizable.xcstrings
        buildPhase: resources
      - path: ThinkAloud/Resources/InfoPlist.xcstrings
        buildPhase: resources
    info:
      path: ThinkAloud/Resources/Info.plist
      properties:
        CFBundleName: ThinkAloud
        CFBundleDisplayName: ThinkAloud
        CFBundleShortVersionString: $(MARKETING_VERSION)
        CFBundleVersion: $(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
        LSMinimumSystemVersion: $(MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET)
        LSUIElement: true
        NSHumanReadableCopyright: "© 2026 JacobLinCool"
        NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: "ThinkAloud needs microphone access to record your voice for local transcription."
        # Sparkle auto-update. Appcast is published as a GitHub Release asset; the
        # `releases/latest/download/…` URL always resolves to the newest published release.
        SUFeedURL: "https://github.com/JacobLinCool/think-aloud/releases/latest/download/appcast.xml"
        # EdDSA (ed25519) public key from Sparkle's `generate_keys`. The matching private key
        # lives only in the maintainer's Keychain and the CI secret SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY.
        SUPublicEDKey: "8IyjtacKsc5qlweQsGwig2OyD9e2dETsJzzy4QL1A8o="
        # Default automatic checks on (and skip Sparkle's own second-launch opt-in prompt —
        # we expose our own toggle in Settings → Updates instead).
        SUEnableAutomaticChecks: true
        # Allow the optional "download & install automatically" path (off by default in the UI).
        SUAllowsAutomaticUpdates: true
        # Check once per day.
        SUScheduledCheckInterval: 86400
    entitlements:
      path: ThinkAloud/Resources/ThinkAloud.entitlements
      properties:
        com.apple.security.device.audio-input: true
        com.apple.security.cs.disable-library-validation: true
        com.apple.security.cs.allow-jit: true
        com.apple.security.cs.allow-unsigned-executable-memory: true
        com.apple.security.automation.apple-events: true
    settings:
      base:
        PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER: com.jacoblincool.thinkaloud
        PRODUCT_NAME: ThinkAloud
        CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY: "Developer ID Application"
        CODE_SIGN_STYLE: Manual
        ENABLE_HARDENED_RUNTIME: YES
        DEVELOPMENT_TEAM: "5H75SGA7KP"
        ASSETCATALOG_COMPILER_APPICON_NAME: AppIcon
        COMBINE_HIDPI_IMAGES: YES
      configs:
        # Debug skips the timestamp server round-trip for faster local signing.
        Debug:
          OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS: "--timestamp=none"
        # Release MUST embed a secure timestamp — required by the notary, and applied to
        # Sparkle's nested helpers/XPC services so the signed update validates. Never add --deep.
        Release:
          OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS: "--timestamp"
    dependencies:
      - package: KeyboardShortcuts
      - package: mlx-audio-swift
        product: MLXAudioSTT
      - package: mlx-audio-swift
        product: MLXAudioCore
      - package: mlx-swift
        product: MLX
      - package: GRDB
        product: GRDB
      - package: Sparkle
        product: Sparkle

  ThinkAloudTests:
    type: bundle.unit-test
    platform: macOS
    deploymentTarget: "15.0"
    sources:
      - path: ThinkAloudTests
    dependencies:
      - target: ThinkAloud
    settings:
      base:
        PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER: com.jacoblincool.thinkaloud.tests
        CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY: "-"
        ENABLE_HARDENED_RUNTIME: NO
        DEVELOPMENT_TEAM: ""
        GENERATE_INFOPLIST_FILE: YES

schemes:
  ThinkAloud:
    build:
      targets:
        ThinkAloud: all
        ThinkAloudTests: [test]
    test:
      targets:
        - ThinkAloudTests
      gatherCoverageData: false
    run:
      config: Debug
    archive:
      config: Release

cd /tmp/sparkle-tools
# Export the private key from Keychain to a temp file OUTSIDE the repo (writes silently; may prompt Keychain once).
./bin/generate_keys -x /tmp/sparkle_priv.key 2>/tmp/gk_err.txt
if [ ! -s /tmp/sparkle_priv.key ]; then echo "EXPORT FAILED:"; cat /tmp/gk_err.txt; exit 1; fi

# Securely remove the temp key file.
rm -P /tmp/sparkle_priv.key 2>/dev/null || rm -f /tmp/sparkle_priv.key
rm -f /tmp/gk_err.txt
echo "=== confirm secret now present ==="

content.text:
完成。版本已解析為 **0.2.0**（`CFBundleShortVersionString`）；build number 維持 1（CI 發佈時會以 run number 覆寫）。

兩件代勞都完成了：

## ✅ 已處理
1. **GitHub secret `SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY`** — 已從你 Keychain 匯出私鑰並設為 repo secret（過程未印出金鑰、暫存檔已安全刪除）。`gh secret list` 確認存在：
   ```
   SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY  2026-05-29T08:58:33Z
   ```
2. **App 版本 → 0.2.0** — `project.yml` 的 `MARKETING_VERSION` 改為 `0.2.0`，已 `xcodegen generate`，build settings 確認 `MARKETING_VERSION = 0.2.0`。設定 → 更新分頁會顯示「目前版本 0.2.0 (1)」。

現在自動更新的所有環節都就緒了：公鑰在 app、私鑰在 CI secret、appcast 流程在 `release.yml`。

## 接下來只剩發佈
推一個 tag 就會觸發完整流程（建置 → 簽章 → 公證 → staple → 簽 appcast → 發佈）：
```bash
git tag v0.2.0 && git push origin v0.2.0
```
> ⚠️ 注意版本排序：Sparkle 用 `CFBundleVersion`（= CI 的 `GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER`）判斷新舊。只要之後每次發佈的 run number 遞增就沒問題；這是 CI 既有行為，無需手動管。

## 狀態
- 改動目前 **staged 但未 commit**（你只授權設 secret + 改版本，沒提到 commit）。
- 12+ 檔案變更、編譯零警告、42 測試全綠、對抗式審查 0 真實 bug。

要我幫你**開分支 + commit**（例如 `feat: add Sparkle auto-update`）嗎？或你想先在本機跑一次 app、用「檢查更新…」實際點點看再說都行。

content.text:
先說明一個關鍵現實：這個 repo **目前沒有任何在 PR 上跑的 CI** ——只有 tag 觸發的 `release.yml`（建置/簽章/公證）。所以「CI 過了之後 merge」目前無從評估。

最能忠實實現你流程的做法是**補一個在 PR 上跑的建置 CI**，讓「CI 通過」成為真實的檢查。我加一個 build-only（停用簽章、不會像測試那樣因未簽章而 hang、不依賴 secret、最穩健）的 workflow，測試我已在本機用真實簽章驗證過 42 個全綠。

先寫 CI workflow，commit 進這個分支。

input.content:
# Build check for PRs and main. Compiles the app on a clean runner so broken builds
# are caught before merge. (Signing/notarization + the unit tests that need a signed
# host app are exercised by the tag-driven release workflow; a plain build needs neither.)
name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: macos-15
    timeout-minutes: 40

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Select latest Xcode
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          # mlx-audio-swift needs swift-tools-version:6.2 (Xcode 16.4+); pick the newest installed.
          LATEST=$(ls -d /Applications/Xcode_*.app | sort -V | tail -1)
          echo "Selecting $LATEST"
          sudo xcode-select -s "$LATEST"
          xcodebuild -version
          swift --version

      - name: Install build deps
        run: brew install xcodegen

      - name: Generate Xcode project
        run: xcodegen generate

      - name: Build
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          xcodebuild build \
            -project ThinkAloud.xcodeproj \
            -scheme ThinkAloud \
            -configuration Debug \
            -destination 'generic/platform=macOS' \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO

echo "=== create PR ==="
gh pr create \
  --base main \
  --head feat/sparkle-auto-update \
  --title "feat: Sparkle auto-update + bump to 0.2.0" \
  --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## What

Adds **check-for-updates and self-update** via [Sparkle](https://sparkle-project.org/) 2.x for the notarized Developer-ID DMG shipped through GitHub Releases, and bumps the app to **0.2.0**.

### App
- `UpdaterController` (`@MainActor @Observable`) wraps `SPUStandardUpdaterController`, owned by `AppContainer` for the app's lifetime.
- Menu bar **Check for Updates…** (auto-disabled mid-check via `validateMenuItem`).
- **Settings → Updates** pane: current version, manual check, and toggles for automatic checking + automatic download&install. Default: *check automatically, prompt before installing*.

### Build (`project.yml` → xcodegen)
- Sparkle SPM dep (`from: 2.8.0`, resolves 2.9.2) + Info.plist `SUFeedURL`, `SUPublicEDKey`, `SUEnableAutomaticChecks`, `SUAllowsAutomaticUpdates`, daily check.
- Release signs with `--timestamp` (Debug keeps `--timestamp=none`) so Sparkle's nested helpers/XPC services get a secure timestamp and notarize. Never `--deep`.
- `MARKETING_VERSION` 0.1.0 → 0.2.0.

### CI
- `release.yml`: new **Generate Sparkle appcast** step EdDSA-signs the stapled DMG and uploads a one-item `appcast.xml`; `SUFeedURL` → `releases/latest/download/appcast.xml`. Needs the `SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY` secret (set), skips gracefully if unset.
- New `ci.yml`: build check on PRs/main.

## Verification
- Clean build, **zero warnings**.
- **42 unit tests pass** (1 env-gated skip) with real Developer-ID signing.
- `sign_update` signing/verify round-trip confirmed; built Info.plist contains all Sparkle keys; Sparkle.framework embedded.
- Adversarial multi-agent review: 0 real bugs.

## After merge
Tag `v0.2.0` to publish the first auto-update-capable release. The `SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY` secret is already configured; `SUPublicEDKey` is committed.
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -5

  fi
  sleep 30
done

while true; do
  line=$(gh run view "$RID" --repo JacobLinCool/think-aloud --json status,conclusion -q '.status + " " + (.conclusion // "running")' 2>/dev/null || echo "error -")

    echo "Release run $RID completed: ${line#* }"
    break
  fi
  sleep 30
done

content.text:
全部完成並驗證上線。🎉

## 端對端成果

| 階段 | 狀態 |
|---|---|
| PR #2 CI build | ✅ pass (9m23s) |
| Squash 合併進 `main` | ✅ `0e546a5` |
| `v0.2.0` tag → release workflow | ✅ success（建置/簽章/公證/staple/簽 appcast/發佈） |
| GitHub Release v0.2.0 | ✅ DMG + appcast.xml，標記為 latest |
| `releases/latest/download/appcast.xml`（SUFeedURL） | ✅ HTTP 200，內容正確 |
| **EdDSA 簽章對發佈 DMG 驗證** | ✅ **VALID**（Sparkle 用戶端安裝前的同款檢查） |

## 自動更新現已全線運作

- App 內：選單列「檢查更新…」+ 設定 → 更新分頁（自動檢查、安裝前先詢問）
- 線上：`v0.2.0` 是第一個含 Sparkle 的版本，appcast 已供應、簽章可驗
- 私鑰 secret `SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY` 已設、公鑰已內建

## 之後怎麼出新版
只要把改動合進 `main`、推一個遞增的 `v*` tag（如 `v0.3.0`），CI 就會自動建置、簽章、產生 appcast 並發佈；裝了 0.2.0 的使用者會在每日背景檢查（或手動「檢查更新…」）收到更新，**經簽章驗證後**才安裝。

> 小提醒：Sparkle 用 `CFBundleVersion`（CI 的 run number，本次是 `4`）判斷新舊，務必保持遞增——這是 CI 既有行為，無需手動管。

需要的話我可以幫你在本機跑一次 0.2.0、實際點「檢查更新…」看 UI，或調整預設（例如改成預設開啟自動安裝、改檢查頻率）。
